name: JSON Conditional
description: Picks the 'then' value of the first case whose 'when' is truthy. Truthiness is strict: only JSON false and null are falsy; everything else (including 0, empty strings/arrays/objects) is truthy. Use to express declarative branching based on prior step results.

cases.description: Vector of {when, then} maps. The first case with a truthy 'when' has its 'then' returned.

when.description: Condition. Truthy unless null or false.

then.description: Value to return if condition is truthy.

default.description: Optional value to return if no case matches.

result.description: The 'then' of the first matching case, or the default, or null.
